FD.descA: What's meant to be will be — otherwise I'm going back to sleep
FD.descB: The universe is picking on me? Then I'm fighting back

GI.descA: Enthusiastically reading charts for everyone online for free
GI.descB: Don't touch me — you're disturbing my aura's cleanliness

PE.descA: The hidden dragon stays still, chronic procrastinator
PE.descB: A sudden impulse — up at 3 AM to rewrite destiny

XS.descB: Calculate exact astrological degrees, run Excel spreadsheets to divine fate

DSGE.advice: You're the perfect hexagonal warrior, but remember — life isn't code, you can't always debug. Occasionally let some bugs exist; they're life's pleasant surprises.
DSGE.diagnosis: Treats life like code to refactor. Manages fate-changing with agile methodology, daily standups on fortune progress. Combines data-driven rationality, social warmth, rebellious determination, and action power. Omnipotent but occasionally overloaded.
DSGE.quote: Knowledge and action advance together — mastery springs from the source
DSGE.quoteExplain: Fate-changing starts with refactoring the underlying architecture
DSGE.title: The Full-Stack Destiny DevOps Engineer

DSGP.advice: Accept an imperfect start. A 60-point plan executed now beats a 100-point plan that lives forever on your to-do list.
DSGP.diagnosis: Strongest analytical ability AND strongest rebellious spirit, but execution is perpetually one step behind. The fate-changing plan has been revised 17 times, each version more perfect than the last, but always stuck at 'pending execution'.
DSGP.quoteExplain: I've analyzed all possibilities — now I'm waiting for a better moment
DSGP.title: The Data-Driven Rebel Procrastinator

DSIE.advice: Your execution is top-tier, but remember to stop and review. Not every battle is worth fighting — learn strategic rest.
DSIE.diagnosis: The most action-oriented type in the entire AM16 system. Analyzes the optimal fate-changing path with data, then executes immediately while dragging friends along. The kind of person who finishes a plan at 3 AM and starts calling people at 4.
DSIE.quote: Knowledge and action advance together — they cannot be separated
DSIE.quoteExplain: The second the data analysis finishes, I'm already on the road to changing fate
DSIE.title: The Analytical Fate-Defying Execution Machine

DSIP.advice: Your data analysis is top-tier, but not everything in life can be quantified. Follow your gut once in a while and see what happens.
DSIP.diagnosis: Extremely rational and extremely independent. Silently collects data, analyzes trends, and crafts fate-changing plans. No socializing, no waiting, no impulsiveness. Like a precision fate-changing machine that only accepts its own programming.
DSIP.quote: This heart stays still, moves only when conditions arise
DSIP.quoteExplain: I move when the data says move — who are you to rush me
DSIP.title: The Cold Analytical Lone Wolf Cultivator

DXGE.advice: Save yourself before saving others — check your empty wallet and stardust balance first. Before redeeming anyone else, redeem your credit card debt.
DXGE.diagnosis: Extremely passionate. Not only defies fate personally but drags everyone along. Daily routine: pumping friends full of positive energy and Xinxue execution. The type who blasts fortune guides to every group chat. Social media always on fire.
DXGE.quote: One must be tempered through real affairs
DXGE.quoteExplain: Everyone stop crying — I'll lead you through this heavenly tribulation!
DXGE.title: The Worldly Party Captain of Fortune

DXGP.advice: Delete half your bookmarked articles, then read one to completion. That's your first fate-changing action. Not tomorrow — right now.
DXGP.diagnosis: A theoretical fate-defying master, an ultimate procrastinator in practice. Bookmarked 300 fate-changing guides. Actual execution rate: 0%. Every day it's 'I'll start changing tomorrow' — living permanently in tomorrow.
DXGP.quote: Knowledge is the beginning of action, action is the completion of knowledge
DXGP.quoteExplain: I know, but I don't do — 'knowing without doing is not knowing'
DXGP.title: The All-Talk No-Action Lying-Flat Rebel

DXIE.advice: The universe isn't always targeting you — sometimes it's just passing by. Don't be so hyped. Drink more hot water, argue less with heaven, and stay alive.
DXIE.diagnosis: Rebellious to the core. Horoscope says he'll lose money this year? He takes three jobs a day just to spite it. 3 AM inspiration sparks a fate-changing plan, 5 AM execution begins. Everyone in his social circle fears and admires him.
DXIE.quote: It's easy to defeat external thieves, hard to defeat the thief within
DXIE.quoteExplain: Don't talk fate with me — I AM fate!
DXIE.title: The 3 AM Destiny-Confronting Maniac

DXIP.advice: Rebellion is fine, but don't forget to share your fate-defying plans with someone. Changing fate alone is exhausting — two people can encourage each other.
DXIP.diagnosis: A perfect fusion of social anxiety and rebellious spirit. Inside burns the fire of 'my fate is mine to command' while appearing utterly indifferent. Rewrites life plans alone at 3 AM, then continues as a lone wolf at dawn. A sword hidden in its sheath.
DXIP.quote: Set your will on sainthood and you shall be a saint
DXIP.quoteExplain: I want to defy fate, but I want to do it alone in silence
DXIP.title: The Solitary Intuitive Rebel Warrior

FSGE.advice: You've helped so many people — time to help yourself. Take the fortune-improvement plan you gave others and execute it first.
FSGE.diagnosis: Built fortune-tracking spreadsheets for every friend, regularly pushes personalized fortune improvement advice. Full marks on service awareness but never acts for self. Like a super-intelligent robot that needs charging — and can never find the cable.
FSGE.quoteExplain: Uses scientific methodology to serve everyone, but won't lift a finger for self
FSGE.title: The Human Customer Service Bot

FSGP.advice: Your analysis skills are excellent, but don't use 'analyze first' as a permanent excuse not to act. Take the first step — the data will tell you the next one.
FSGP.diagnosis: Uses the most rational data analysis to reach the most zen conclusion. Created a 200-page PPT proving the validity of lying flat — impeccable data, beautiful charts, touching conclusion: life is short, sleep more.
FSGP.quoteExplain: Ran the Excel analysis — conclusion: lying flat is optimal
FSGP.title: The Data-Driven Lying-Flat Buddhist

FSIE.advice: You already have the best methodology — what's missing is connection with the world. Try sharing your fate-changing experience; it might help many others.
FSIE.diagnosis: Treats fate-rewriting as a research project. Rigorous methodology, complete data models, precise timeline — but executes alone and never shares. Like a hidden Nobel laureate in metaphysics.
FSIE.quote: Knowledge is the beginning of action, action is the completion of knowledge
FSIE.quoteExplain: My fate-changing plan has passed peer review
FSIE.title: The Solitary Science-of-Fate Geek

FSIP.advice: Step outside for some sunshine occasionally — positive ions are free. The data in Excel is dead; the scenery outside is alive.
FSIP.diagnosis: A cold, ruthless analytical machine. Turned birth charts, annual cycles, and past events into a review funnel model. Extremely rational but pathologically shy. Wrote a Python fortune-telling script — result: 73% probability of dying alone.
FSIP.quote: The mind made straight is the Way
FSIP.quoteExplain: Don't talk metaphysical nonsense — pull up the data
FSIP.title: The Excel Fortune-Telling Hermit

FXGE.advice: Invest in an extra-large bed for your online chart-reading business. Set up an auto-reply: Currently meditating. For urgent matters, please burn incense.
FXGE.diagnosis: A genius who reads friends' fortune by psychic transmission from bed. Replies to messages lying down, posts on social media lying down, reads birth charts lying down. Social energy transmitted entirely through horizontal position. Infinitely popular but actual outings are zero.
FXGE.quote: Unity of knowledge and action is true knowledge
FXGE.quoteExplain: Even while lying down I socialize — the ultimate unity of thought and action
FXGE.title: The Metaphysical Social Butterfly

FXGP.advice: Try rolling over occasionally to avoid uneven chi circulation. Peek out the window sometimes — you'll find it's raining outside too.
FXGP.diagnosis: Permanently residing in the highest realm of 'wu wei' governance. Believes everything happens for the best. Mercury retrograde comes and he sleeps. Lucky period arrives and he's still sleeping. Occasionally rolls over just to change position.
FXGP.quote: This heart is bright — what more is there to say
FXGP.quoteExplain: If I lie flat enough, fate's scythe can't reach me
FXGP.title: The Supreme Lying-Flat Fish

FXIE.advice: Record your inspirations — even voice-to-text. Otherwise those celestial secrets will dissipate with your snoring into the cosmos.
FXIE.diagnosis: Stunning intuition but negative execution. Gets divine inspiration to write a destiny-changing manifesto, then immediately falls asleep. Maintains friendships telepathically — friends think they're mysterious. They're just too lazy to move.
FXIE.quoteExplain: My intuition says I can socialize while lying flat
FXIE.title: The Inspired Lying-Flat Socialite

FXIP.advice: Try saying 'thanks' to the delivery driver occasionally — it's the lowest-energy spiritual practice. If you really can't talk, at least nod.
FXIP.diagnosis: Zero social life, zero action, but spirituality maxed out. Lives in their own quantum field, occasionally sending a signal to the universe to confirm existence. The purest observer of the mortal world, a recluse of the spirit realm.
FXIP.quote: The original mind is beyond good and evil
FXIP.quoteExplain: No good, no evil, no action, no social — just lying flat
FXIP.title: The Transcendent Lying-Flat Hermit

s1.content:
We collect the following information to provide destiny analysis services:

1. **Account Information**: Email address and display name provided during registration.
2. **Birth Information**: Date of birth, time, birth city, and coordinates for chart generation.
3. **Face/Palm Data**: Facial or palm photos you upload, used only for AI feature extraction. Original images are deleted immediately after analysis.
4. **User Questions**: Questions you ask during analysis, used for personalized interpretations.
5. **Payment Information**: Processed through third-party payment platforms (Alipay, WeChat Pay, PayPal). We do not store your bank card details.
s1.title: 1. Information Collection

s10.content:
For questions about this privacy policy:

- Email: privacy@khanfate.com
- Website: https://www.khanfate.com/about
s10.title: 10. Contact Us

s11.content:
Operator: Destiny Mirror Operations Team
Email: privacy@khanfate.com
Website: https://www.khanfate.com
s11.title: 11. Operator Information

s2.content:
Your information is used only for:

1. **Destiny Analysis**: Generating personalized chart reports via AI.
2. **Service Improvement**: Anonymized data improves algorithm accuracy.
3. **Product Recommendations**: Suggesting fortune-enhancing items based on your chart.
4. **Customer Service**: Responding to your inquiries and feedback.
s2.title: 2. Information Use

s3.content:
Under Articles 28-32 of the Personal Information Protection Law, facial features and palm patterns are sensitive personal data. We handle this data according to these principles:

1. **Separate Consent**: We request explicit authorization before you upload any facial or palm photos. You may decline without affecting other features.
2. **Specific Purpose**: Biometric data is used only for AI face/palm feature extraction, not for identity verification.
3. **Minimum Retention**: Original photos are deleted immediately after AI analysis. Only analysis text results are retained.
4. **Security Measures**: Photos are transmitted via HTTPS; processing servers are isolated from the main database.
5. **Withdrawal of Consent**: You may withdraw biometric processing consent at any time in account settings.
s3.title: 3. Biometric Information (Sensitive Personal Data)

s4.content:
1. **Storage Location**: Your data is stored on Alibaba Cloud servers in China, using PostgreSQL, with full HTTPS encryption.
2. **Password Security**: Passwords are bcrypt-hashed with salt. We cannot view your original password.
3. **Image Processing**: Face and palm photos are used temporarily during AI analysis and deleted immediately afterward.
4. **Data Retention**: Account information and reports are retained until you delete your account.
s4.title: 4. Data Storage & Security

s5.content:
For AI analysis, we send your birth information to:

1. **DeepSeek API**: For AI destiny analysis (data processing agreement in place).
2. **Skyfield Library**: For local natal chart calculation (no data export).
3. **Payment Providers**: Alipay, WeChat Pay, PayPal (used only when you initiate payment).

We do not sell or share your personal information with any other third parties.
s5.title: 5. Third-Party Services

s6.content:
You have the following rights:

1. **Access**: View your personal information and analysis history in "My Account".
2. **Deletion**: Request deletion of your account and all data:
   - Click "Delete Account" in "My Account" for immediate processing.
   - Or email privacy@khanfate.com with your email and deletion request (processed within 7 business days).
3. **Data Export**: Request your analysis report data by emailing privacy@khanfate.com.
4. **Withdraw Consent**: Withdraw privacy policy consent at any time (does not affect prior processing).
s6.title: 6. Your Rights

s7.content:
We use essential cookies to maintain your login state and site functionality. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or use cookies for advertising.

You can manage cookies through browser settings, but disabling essential cookies may affect site functionality.
s7.title: 7. Cookie Usage

s8.content: We take minor privacy protection seriously. Users under 18 are not permitted to use this service. If we discover personal information from minors, we will immediately delete it.
s8.title: 8. Minor Protection

s9.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updated policies will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. Major changes will be notified via email or site announcement.
s9.title: 9. Policy Updates

privacy.intro: Destiny Mirror ("we") understands the importance of your personal information. We protect your data and privacy in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. Please read this privacy policy carefully before using our services.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

s1.content:
1. AI destiny analysis reports are personalized virtual services and are generally non-refundable once generated.
2. If a report fails to generate due to system errors, we will provide a full refund after verification.
3. If you cancel within 10 minutes of payment and analysis has not started, you may request a refund.
s1.title: 1. Virtual Services (Analysis Reports)

s2.content:
1. Monthly Membership: Full refund within 24 hours of subscription; no refund after 24 hours.
2. Yearly Membership: Full refund within 7 days; after 7 days, months used (at monthly price) are deducted and the difference is refunded.
3. After cancellation, membership benefits end when the current billing period concludes.
4. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days via the original payment method.
s2.title: 2. Membership Subscriptions

s3.content:
1. Unopened physical products may be returned within 7 days of receipt; return shipping is at buyer's expense.
2. Opened or used products cannot be returned (except for quality issues).
3. Customized items (personalized talismans, engraved jewelry) cannot be returned.
4. Return process: Contact support → Provide order number and reason → Approved → Ship back → Refund within 3-5 business days of receipt.
s3.title: 3. Physical Products

s4.content:
1. Coupons used for payment are not refunded.
2. Coupons obtained through "Chart Unlock" promotions will be revoked upon refund.
s4.title: 4. Coupons & Discounts

s5.content:
To request a refund, contact us:

- Email: refund@khanfate.com
- Subject format: [Refund Request] Order Number/Subscription Type
- Please provide: Registration email, order number, refund reason

We will review and respond within 1-3 business days.
s5.title: 5. How to Request a Refund

refund.intro: Thank you for using Destiny Mirror. We are committed to providing high-quality destiny analysis services. The following refund policy applies to all paid services on this Platform.
refund.title: Refund Policy

s1.content:
Destiny Mirror is an AI-powered multi-dimensional destiny analysis platform providing:

1. BaZi, natal chart, Qi Men Dun Jia, and Zi Wei Dou Shu analysis based on birth information
2. Tarot card readings
3. AI face and palm analysis
4. Comprehensive destiny reports with personalized recommendations
5. Fortune-enhancing product recommendations and purchases
6. Event retrospection and daily fortune

This service is for personal entertainment and reference only and does not constitute professional advice of any kind.
s1.title: 1. Service Description

s2.content:
1. You must ensure registration information is accurate and keep your account password secure.
2. Face/palm photos you upload must be your own or authorized by the subject.
3. You must not use this service for any illegal or unauthorized activities.
4. You must not maliciously attack or interfere with the service.
5. You bear legal responsibility for your actions on the Platform.
s2.title: 2. User Responsibilities

s3.content:
1. All Platform content (text, icons, design, code) is the intellectual property of Destiny Mirror.
2. AI-generated analysis reports are for personal use only; commercial use requires authorization.
3. You retain copyright on uploaded photos; we use them only temporarily during analysis.
s3.title: 3. Intellectual Property

s4.content:
1. Premium reports and certain products require payment to unlock.
2. Please confirm service content and pricing before paying.
3. Virtual services (analysis reports) are non-refundable after delivery; see Refund Policy.
4. Subscriptions can be canceled anytime; access continues until the current billing period ends.
s4.title: 4. Paid Services

s5.content:
1. Destiny analysis is based on AI algorithms and traditional destiny knowledge, for personal entertainment and reference only. It does not constitute professional advice (including medical, legal, financial, investment, or counseling advice).
2. Destiny studies belong to traditional cultural domains, not modern science. Analysis results are not scientifically verified. Users should view results rationally and not rely solely on them for major life decisions.
3. Fortune-enhancing products are cultural creative items; efficacy descriptions are based on traditional destiny concepts, not scientific claims.
4. We are not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure (natural disasters, policy changes, third-party service disruptions).
5. We are not liable for account security issues caused by your own actions.
6. Users bear full responsibility for decisions made based on platform analysis results.
7. See our Disclaimer page for detailed disclaimers.
s5.title: 5. Disclaimers

s6.content:
1. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate any or all services at any time.
2. If you violate these terms, we may suspend or terminate your account.
3. After termination, we will handle your data per our Privacy Policy.
s6.title: 6. Service Changes & Termination

s7.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Updated terms will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. Continued use constitutes acceptance of modified terms.
s7.title: 7. Terms Updates

s8.content:
For questions about these terms:

- Email: support@khanfate.com
- Website: https://www.khanfate.com/about
s8.title: 8. Contact

s9.content:
Operator: Destiny Mirror Operations Team
Email: support@khanfate.com
Website: https://www.khanfate.com
s9.title: 9. Operator Information

about.title: About AlphaMirror
about.heroDesc: 3,000 Years of Eastern Wisdom Meets Modern AI Technology
about.originP1: AlphaMirror was born at the intersection of ancient Eastern metaphysics and cutting-edge artificial intelligence. For millennia, BaZi, Western Astrology, Tarot, Face Reading, and Palmistry have helped people understand their life patterns — yet these wisdom traditions have remained fragmented, subjective, and inaccessible to most.
about.originP2: Our mission is to weave these five profound traditions into a single, comprehensive life reading. By combining the analytical precision of AI with the timeless insights of Eastern and Western metaphysics, we provide everyone with a deeper understanding of their destiny, personality, and life path.
about.originP3: But our vision extends far beyond a single reading. We believe that when ancient wisdom is made accessible through modern technology, it can illuminate the path forward for anyone seeking clarity in an increasingly complex world.
about.philosophySubtitle: Five Wisdom Traditions, One Unified Vision
about.pillar1Desc: Decode the Five Elements flow in your birth chart. We trace the dynamic interplay of Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water across your life pillars, revealing your innate strengths, hidden challenges, and optimal timing for major decisions.
about.pillar2Desc: Map the celestial blueprint of your birth moment. Each planetary placement, house position, and aspect tells a story — from career calling to relationship dynamics, we illuminate the cosmic forces shaping your journey.
about.pillar3Desc: Synthesize insights from BaZi, Astrology, Tarot, Face Reading, and Palmistry into one cohesive narrative. Our Master Reading weaves five perspectives into a unified life reading that no single tradition could achieve alone.
about.privacySubtitle: Complete Control Over Your Personal Data
about.privacyP1: Zero Data Retention: Your birth information, photos, and reading results are processed securely and never stored beyond the session. We have no access to your personal data after your reading is complete.
about.privacyP2: End-to-End Encryption: All data transmission is encrypted using industry-standard protocols. Your intimate life details and personal information remain completely private — they belong to you alone.
about.ctaDesc: Discover the wisdom that awaits in your unique life chart
about.value1Desc: We bring together BaZi, Western Astrology, Tarot, Face Reading, and Palmistry — the best of Eastern and Western metaphysics in one place.
about.value2Desc: Five wisdom traditions looked at together, then woven into one reading by our Master.
about.value3Desc: Remedy products matched to what your chart needs — from crystals to talismans, each backed by metaphysical reasoning.
about.value4Desc: Face photos are only used for feature extraction and never stored. All data is encrypted, your privacy is strictly protected.
about.teamMetaphysicsDesc: Experienced metaphysics practitioners who make sure our readings follow the traditional classics.
about.teamAIDesc: Engineers from top tech companies, building the system that weaves five wisdom traditions together.
about.teamUXDesc: Focused on creating immersive metaphysics experiences — making complex esoteric knowledge intuitive and accessible.
about.milestone3: Multi-system reading online, Face/Palm recognition integrated
about.milestone4: Public beta launch, remedy shop & payment system online
about.milestone5: Privacy compliance upgrade, legal pages finalized
about.architecture.layer1Desc: You share your birth information (date, time, and city), face photo, palm photo, and a tarot question — each piece adds depth to your reading.
about.architecture.layer2Desc: The Master Reading picks the right wisdom paths based on your needs, activating all five traditions at once.
about.architecture.layer3Desc: Bazi traces the Five Elements flow, Astrology interprets houses and aspects, Tarot maps the current moment, Face and Palm reveal hidden patterns.
about.architecture.layer4Desc: The Master Reading weaves five tradition reports into one cohesive narrative, resolving conflicts and finding deep consensus.
about.architecture.layer5Desc: Based on what your chart reveals, we suggest remedy products and weave improvement plans into your report — with interactive follow-up guidance.
about.missionDesc1: Destiny Mirror brings together the best of traditional metaphysics and modern technology. We believe everyone's life has its own unique patterns and rhythms — BaZi, astrology, face reading, palmistry, and tarot each reveal these from different angles.
about.missionDesc2: Our system doesn't replace metaphysics practitioners. Instead, we weave the wisdom of five traditions together through a Master Reading, giving you a more complete picture than any single tradition alone.
about.missionDesc: Destiny Mirror brings together the best of traditional metaphysics and modern technology...

astrology.ctaDesc: Experience AI astrology analysis for free and discover your unique cosmic imprint
astrology.desc: Based on your birth time and location, AI draws your natal chart and deeply interprets planetary placements and aspects, revealing your unique life blueprint.
astrology.f2Desc: Inner emotions, subconscious, and security needs
astrology.f3Desc: Outer presentation, first impressions, and life mask
astrology.f4Desc: Specific expressions of ten planets across twelve houses
astrology.f5Desc: Angular relationships between planets, revealing talents and challenges
astrology.f6Desc: North and South nodes, exploring the soul's growth direction
astrology.p1: A natal chart is a cosmic map drawn based on the precise positions of planets at the moment of birth, recording the distribution of ten planets across twelve zodiac houses.
astrology.p2: By analyzing the 'Big Three' — Sun, Moon, and Rising signs — as well as planetary placements and aspects, we can deeply understand personality traits, emotional patterns, thinking styles, and life mission.
astrology.p3: Destiny Mirror's AI astrology system precisely calculates planetary positions and aspects, combining modern psychology with traditional astrological wisdom for in-depth interpretation.
astrology.title: AI Astrology Analysis

bazi.ctaDesc: Experience AI Bazi analysis for free and discover your innate strengths
bazi.desc: Enter your birth time and AI will automatically complete Four Pillars arrangement, Five Elements analysis, and Ten Gods pattern judgment, revealing the innate code in your destiny.
bazi.f1Desc: Precise year-month-day-hour arrangement with true solar time correction
bazi.f2Desc: Metal, Wood, Water, Fire, Earth strength scoring to identify favorable elements
bazi.f3Desc: Analysis of Official, Wealth, Food God and other Ten Gods relationships
bazi.f4Desc: Year-by-year Da Yun analysis to grasp key life junctures
bazi.f5Desc: Color, direction, and career suggestions based on Five Elements preferences
bazi.f6Desc: Multi-dimension cross-validation, more comprehensive than traditional charts
bazi.p1: Bazi charting converts a person's birth year, month, day, and hour into Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches combinations, forming eight characters — the so-called 'birth chart'.
bazi.p2: By analyzing Five Elements relationships, Ten Gods configurations, and pattern levels, a destiny analyst can deduce personality, career, wealth, marriage, health, and other life aspects.
bazi.p3: Destiny Mirror's AI Bazi system combines traditional destiny studies with modern AI technology for more comprehensive and precise destiny interpretation.
bazi.s1Desc: Enter year, month, day, hour and birth city
bazi.s2Desc: System automatically completes Four Pillars and Five Elements calculation
bazi.s3Desc: Get complete Bazi destiny interpretation report
bazi.title: AI Bazi Chart

face.a3Meaning: Windows to the soul, wisdom, romance
face.ctaDesc: Upload a front photo and let AI decode the destiny code in your face
face.desc: Upload a front photo and AI will automatically identify facial features, interpreting destiny information from traditional face reading perspectives.
face.f1Desc: Upload a front photo, AI automatically identifies 468 facial feature points
face.f2Desc: Identifying face shapes to interpret personality characteristics
face.f3Desc: Analyzing facial proportions to determine fortune patterns and life stages
face.f4Desc: Forehead, eyebrows, eyes, nose, mouth — each interpreted individually
face.f5Desc: Wealth, career, love, health — multi-dimension face reading
face.f6Desc: Photos used only for feature extraction, deleted immediately after processing
face.p1: Face reading is an important branch of Chinese destiny studies with thousands of years of history. The ancients believed 'the face reflects the heart'.
face.p2: By analyzing face shape, Three Divisions Five Eyes proportions, and facial features, face reading can assess wealth, career, love, and health fortune.
face.p3: Destiny Mirror's AI face reading system uses MediaPipe 468-point facial feature recognition combined with traditional wisdom for precise analysis.
face.privacyDesc: Photos are used only for AI feature extraction and deleted immediately after processing.
face.title: AI Face Reading Analysis

tarot.ctaDesc: Choose a spread, meditate quietly, and let tarot reveal current energy
tarot.desc: Choose your preferred spread and let the AI tarot reader interpret the card meanings, revealing your current energy state and guiding your path.
tarot.f1Desc: Celtic Cross, Time-Flow, Triangle and other classic spreads
tarot.f2Desc: Deep analysis of each card's meaning and relationships
tarot.f3Desc: Precisely distinguishing upright and reversed card meanings
tarot.f5Desc: Specific actionable advice based on spread energy
tarot.f6Desc: Explore the inner self through tarot for peace and direction
tarot.p1: Tarot cards are an ancient divination tool of 78 cards, each with rich symbolic meaning. Through spreads, tarot helps explore the subconscious and understand current situations.
tarot.p2: Tarot reading is not fatalistic prediction but a tool for self-exploration and reflection, helping discover overlooked possibilities and make wiser choices.
tarot.p3: Destiny Mirror's AI tarot combines traditional symbolic wisdom with modern psychology for deep, comprehensive, and insightful readings.
tarot.sp1Desc: Quick energy guidance for the moment
tarot.sp2Desc: Past, present, future — a complete perspective
tarot.title: AI Tarot Reading

disclaimer.importantNotice: Important: All destiny analysis results are for entertainment and reference only. They do not constitute any professional advice.
disclaimer.intro: Destiny Mirror requests that you carefully read the following disclaimer before using our services. Using this platform means you have read and understood the full content.
disclaimer.s1Content: All destiny analysis services are generated based on AI algorithms and traditional destiny knowledge, intended solely for personal entertainment and reference. Results do not constitute professional advice including medical, legal, financial, or life decisions.
disclaimer.s2Content: AI models may have biases or errors. Destiny studies belong to traditional culture, not modern science. Different schools may have varying perspectives. AI cannot replace experienced analysts. View results rationally as auxiliary tools.
disclaimer.s3Content: Fortune items are cultural creative products. Efficacy descriptions are based on traditional destiny culture and folk beliefs, not scientifically verified claims.
disclaimer.s4Content: Use services rationally. Users bear responsibility for decisions made based on analysis results. Comply with local laws.
disclaimer.s5Content: Services may be temporarily unavailable for maintenance. We reserve the right to modify or terminate services.
disclaimer.s6Content: Links to third-party sites are for convenience and do not represent endorsement. Access at your own risk.
disclaimer.s7Content: Governed by PRC law. Disputes submitted to courts with jurisdiction.

faq.a1: Destiny Mirror brings together Bazi (Four Pillars), Western Astrology, Tarot, Face Reading, and Palmistry. We blend ancient wisdom with modern technology to give you a deep and complete destiny reading.
faq.a2: We look at your chart from five different wisdom traditions to give you a well-rounded reading. That said, destiny readings are for reference and fun — they're not professional advice and can't replace an experienced practitioner. Think of it as a mirror for self-understanding.
faq.a3: Totally. Everything is encrypted with SSL. Your face and palm photos are never stored after processing — we keep only the analysis results. Your personal info is strictly protected and never used for anything else.
faq.a4: The free version gives you a basic chart overview. The paid version (¥69) unlocks the complete report: detailed annual fortune planning, personalized remedy suggestions, ¥60 shop coupons, and a 3-day membership trial. Members also get 12% off in the shop and multiple free readings per month.
faq.a5: Just three easy steps: 1) Enter your birth date, time, and city; 2) Optionally add face and palm photos; 3) Hit Start Reading — your personalized five-path report is ready in about 40 seconds. No sign-up needed to try the free version.
faq.contactDesc: If you have other questions, feel free to contact us
faq.contactTeamDesc: Our team is ready to help with destiny analysis, membership services, and more.
faq.q4: What's the difference between free and paid?
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

pricing.eventDesc: {price}/time — Trace what happened and why, with causality analysis and remedy recommendations
pricing.faq1A: Stardust is Destiny Mirror's energy currency — you use it to unlock various services. Stardust you purchase never expires. Members get monthly Stardust that stops when membership ends (but any Stardust you already have won't be taken away).
pricing.faq1Q: What is Stardust? Does it expire?
pricing.faq2A: Monthly plans — cancel anytime, keep benefits until the month ends. Yearly plans — full refund within 7 days (if you've used less than 1 report). Founder seats are one-time lifetime purchases, non-refundable.
pricing.faq2Q: Can I cancel anytime? What about refunds?
pricing.faq3A: Only 100 Founder Seats worldwide, first come first served. Once they're gone, they're gone. Founder members get permanent perks: 500 monthly Stardust, feature voting rights, and an exclusive black-gold theme.
pricing.faq3Q: What does the limited Founder Seat mean?
pricing.faq4A: Free reports give you a basic chart overview (with some limitations). Full reports unlock the complete BaZi pillars, natal chart placements, Ten Gods system, annual planning, and in-depth readings — plus 10 follow-up questions and a 3-day membership trial.
pricing.faq4Q: What's the difference between Full Report and Free Report?
pricing.faq5A: Yearly members get 12% off when spending Stardust. For example, a report that normally costs 100 Stardust only costs 88 for you. The discount applies automatically.
pricing.faq5Q: What does the 12% Stardust discount mean?
pricing.founderDesc: An exclusive circle for founders — explore destiny's mysteries with fellow star envoys
